steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
All three terms have the same variable part, $x^4$, so combine only the coefficients:
$$
9x^4+12x^4-12x^4=(9+12-12)x^4
$$

steps.title: Read the coefficient
steps.content: Finish the arithmetic in the coefficient: $$ (9+12-12)x^4=9x^4 $$ Since this is equal to $bx^4$, the coefficient $b$ is the coefficient of $x^4$. The answer is 9.
